creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 188133
patch to add java option and disable perl when disabled

Attached patch create JAVA option for net-mgmt/collectd5. While here, also ensure perl is disabled when the option is deselected, even if perl happens to be installed.

BTW, since perl and python end up as build deps, it might make sense to make those options enabled by default.
